The Degen Playbook

SLIMEWIRE

🐸 trade · hunt · raid · win 🧌

Everything you need to run the swamp like a pro — how to trade with one-tap presets, use every tool, play the game, and raid with your crew. Built for degens. Easy for newbies.

⬇️ Download this playbook (PDF)

SlimeWire is two things in one: a fast Solana memecoin terminal and a game built on top of it. Trade live coins, launch your own, hunt fresh launches — then jump into The Swamp, where real coins become creatures you catch and bosses you raid. This playbook shows you exactly how to use all of it.

🗺️ The map

  1. Get in (30 sec)
  2. The terminal & every tab
  3. How to trade (the important one)
  4. Quick-trade presets explained
  5. Pro tools: Bundle, Snipe, Ogre A.I.
  6. SlimeShield safety
  7. Launch a coin
  8. The Swamp game
  9. Live Boss Raids
  10. All the extra pages
  11. Telegram bot
  12. Flex on X
  13. Tips & FAQ
1

Get In — 30 Seconds

Open slimewire.org. Three doors:

Connect Wallet — tap it, pick Phantom or Solflare, approve. Now you can trade with your own wallet.
Create Account — sign up with email to save presets, referral code and managed wallets across devices.
Browse Terminal — poke around with no login. You can scan coins and play the whole game before connecting anything.
New here? Hit Browse Terminal, then 🎮 Play The Swamp. You learn the vibe with zero risk. Connect a wallet only when you're ready to actually buy.
2

The Terminal & Every Tab

The left nav is your control panel, grouped into sections. Here's where everything lives:

🖥️ Terminal

Live Terminal
Your home base — fresh pairs, best picks, KOL signals, and quick trades in one screen.
Home / Profile
Account: profile pic, X handle, referral code, saved settings & presets.
Smart Chart
Any token's chart, links, transactions and trading context.
Slime Swap
The full buy/sell panel (OgreSwap) with presets — your main trade desk.

📡 Market Intel

Cooks
Fresh + trending pairs cooking right now.
Live Trades
Live buy/sell flow as it happens.
Slime Scope
Fresh, graduating & graduated pump movement.
Watchlist
Coins you saved to track.
KOL Tracker
Watch KOL wallets & copy-trade candidates.

🧌 Ogre Tools & Portfolio

Ogre Tek
Automation deck — A.I. picks, SlimeBot, Bundle, Launch, Snipe.
Wallets / Balances
Balances, managed wallets, funding, sweep, restore.
Positions
Your open holdings + manual exit controls.
PnL
Realized + historical profit/loss cards.

And the fun stuff: 🎮 Play The Swamp 🔥 Live Raids sit right in the nav.

3

How To Trade

Two ways to buy: Quick Buy (fastest) and Slime Swap (full control). Here's the whole flow.

⚡ Quick Buy — the fast lane

Find a coin — tap one in any feed, or paste its contract address (CA) in the search.
Tap Quick Buy. A little panel opens.
Type how much SOL to spend (e.g. 0.10) — or tap a size preset.
Hit Buy & approve. Your fill lands in Positions. Done.

🟢 Slime Swap — full control

Open Slime Swap (or tap a coin → it loads there).
Paste the token CA (or it's already filled from the coin you tapped).
Pick the wallet to trade from.
Set your amount and slippage (see presets below).
Tap Buy → approve. To sell later, flip the route or use the sell % presets.

💸 Selling & exiting

Go to Positions — every open bag is listed with live PnL.
Tap the position and choose a sell %: 25% 50% 100% or custom — great for taking partial profit.
Or set an auto-exit plan (Take Profit / Stop Loss) so it sells for you — see presets.
Golden rule: memecoins are high-risk. Only spend what you can afford to lose, and check the SlimeShield read before you ape.
4

Quick-Trade Presets

Presets are one-tap settings so you trade fast without typing every time. Set your defaults in Home / Profile; tweak per-trade in the panel. Here's what each one means:

💰 Buy Size 0.1 SOL 0.25 0.5 custom

How much SOL a one-tap buy spends. Tap a preset instead of typing the amount every time.

🌀 Slippage 3% 4% 5% custom bps

How much price movement you'll accept on the fill. Fresh/volatile coins need higher slippage to go through. Custom is in bps (basis points): 100 bps = 1%, so 500 = 5%.

📤 Sell % 25% 50% 100% custom

How much of a bag to dump in one tap. Use 25–50% to take profit and ride the rest.

🎯 Take Profit +25% +60% +100% +250%

Auto-sell when it pumps to your target. Custom accepts a % like 500 or a multiple like 5x.

🛑 Stop Loss off -8% -10% -15%

Auto-sell to cut a loser. Set it when you open a position so you don't round-trip a rug.

⏱️ Fallback Sell timer

Auto-sells after a set time if neither TP nor SL hits — so nothing sits forgotten.

⚙️ Priority Fee

Pay a little extra for faster confirmation when the chain is busy / on snipes.

Newbie defaults that just work: Buy 0.1 SOL · Slippage 4% · Take Profit +60% · Stop Loss -10%. Adjust as you get a feel for it.
5

Pro Tools (Ogre Tek)

Ogre Tek is the heavy machinery — bundling, sniping, and the SlimeBot volume engine. Same presets apply (size, slippage, TP/SL). Everything here spends real SOL — start small.

📦 Bundle — many wallets, one tap

Buy or sell the same token across several of your wallets at once — perfect for spreading a launch buy or exiting together.

Paste the Token CA.
Tick the wallets you want included.
Set Buy Per Wallet (e.g. 0.1 SOL each) and a Sell % (25 / 50 / 100 / custom).
Set Slippage (3–5% or custom bps), then Bundle Buy or Bundle Sell.
Auto Exit (optional): add a TP / SL plan + fallback timer that applies to every wallet in the bundle.
Bundle + Launch: bundling is how you get a clean multi-wallet buy on your own coin right as it launches (see §7) — your launch opens with real spread instead of one wallet.

🎯 Snipe — buy the instant it's live

Open Launch Snipe / Launch Watch, set the target (a launch you're watching, or a condition).
Pre-set your size, slippage and a priority fee (pay for speed).
Arm it — the buy fires automatically the moment the coin goes live or your condition hits.

🤖 SlimeBot — the Volume Configurator

SlimeBot generates trading volume on a token using a rotating set of wallets — buys and sells in lifelike patterns so the chart looks active. Open Volume Configurator and set:

📇 Contract Address

The token to run volume on (paste its CA).

💰 Investment 0.1–10 SOL

Total SOL budget. SlimeBot bounds total spend near this — it won't blow past it.

⏱️ Duration 20m–6h

How long the volume runs. Longer = more spaced-out, natural-looking activity.

🧠 Mode Smart Spam

Smart = a fresh wallet each round (organic, looks like many real holders). Spam = faster, denser volume.

🔥 Aggressiveness Low Med High

Controls speed, buy-bias and how many wallets cycle (Low ≈ 4 wallets/slow → High ≈ 10 wallets/fast).

🌊 Stagger pattern Steady Waves Organic Ladder

The buy/sell rhythm: Steady = even drip; Waves = pushes then lulls; Organic = randomized/human; Ladder = stepped climbs.

👛 Pay From

The source wallet that funds the whole run.

Two switches that make it look real

  • 🪙 Leave dust — keeps 1 token in each recycled wallet after it sells, so every wallet reads as a real holder instead of a fully-dumped bot.
  • 🔀 Offset sell — a different wallet sells behind each buy, so there's never an instant self-sell on the same wallet (looks like organic two-sided flow).
Paste CA → set Investment, Duration, Mode, Aggressiveness, Stagger.
Pick Pay From wallet; toggle Leave dust + Offset sell for the most natural look.
Tap Start SlimeBot. Watch the live queue.
When done, tap Stop & Sweep Back to pull remaining SOL back to your source wallet.
Real money: SlimeBot spends real SOL from the source wallet across many small trades; fees add up. Start with a small Investment and a short Duration to see the pattern before scaling.
6

SlimeShield Safety

Every token gets a quick SlimeShield read — a plain verdict (safe / risk / avoid) with the reasons: liquidity, momentum, sell pressure and common rug patterns. You'll see it on token pages and any time you paste a CA. It's a helper, not a guarantee — your call always.

7

Launch A Coin (Pump.fun)

SlimeWire launches your coin on pump.fun from Ogre Tek → Launch Pump Coin. Fill only what you need — the launch buttons stay pinned so you can fire from any tab.

📝 The launch sheet — field by field

🏷️ Name & Symbol

Your coin's name and ticker ($SYMBOL).

🖼️ Image & Description

The coin's picture and blurb — this is what people see first.

🔗 Socials

Website, X and Telegram links shown on the coin.

💵 Dev Buy

Turn on Dev Buy and set how much SOL you buy at launch — your own opening position so you're not buying your coin at zero.

⚙️ Creator Fees

Fee mode + creator-fee % (bps) and the wallet that receives them. Option to burn creator fees or route to a buyback wallet.

🚀 Launching — the flow

Fill the sheet (name, symbol, image, description, socials).
Set your Dev Buy amount and fee handling.
Tap Launch on Pump — SlimeWire sends the details to the launch connector and waits for your new contract address (CA).
Use Use Live CA to drop that CA straight into a preset / the Bundle panel.
Save Launch Sheet keeps your setup; the official Open Pump Create and Pay Dex / Edit Metadata links are there as fallback tools.

📦 Bundle + 🤖 SlimeBot behind your launch

This is the pro combo:

Dev buy opens your position as the coin goes live.
Bundle Buy (§5) spreads an opening buy across several of your wallets — real holder spread, not one whale.
SlimeBot (§5) then runs volume on the CA — buy/sell patterns with Leave dust (every wallet keeps 1 token = looks like a holder) and Offset sell (a different wallet sells behind each buy) so the chart looks alive and two-sided.

🌍 Your coin becomes content

However you launch, on SlimeWire the coin instantly: shows on the Radar, spawns as a boss on Live Raids and a legendary creature in the Swamp, and can fire TG alerts + share cards.

Heads up: dev buy, bundle buys and SlimeBot all spend real SOL. Plan your total budget before you launch.
8

The Swamp Game

Open slimewire.org/swamp or tap Play The Swamp. Free, in your browser, built on real live coins.

🎮 Move & explore

Drag the left side of the screen to move (mobile) or use WASD / arrows (desktop). Pick your ogre on the title screen. Live coins roam as wild creatures — fresh launches are rare, SlimeWire launches are legendary.

✋ Catch coins (build your Dex)

Walk up to a creature and tap ✋ Catch — you'll see its real market cap, age and momentum.
Weaken it first: tap ⚔️ Weaken to drop its HP. Lower HP = much higher catch chance.
Time the bar and tap 🟢 Throw. Caught coins go in your Swampdex with a rarity.
Slimeballs are catch energy — they refill over time, or craft more from resources.

⚔️ Fight for resources

Hostile mobs (goblins, wolves, bears) roam too. Tap the ⚔️ Attack button to fight them; they drop wood, scrap & goo. Spend those at the Clan Camp to craft slimeballs and fortify your base.

🗓️ Raid days, clans & survival

  • Raid Day (Sat 2pm → Sun 2am UTC): more & tougher enemies. Rest of week = build & gather. Watch the HUD countdown.
  • Clans — set a tag at the Clan Camp; everyone with your tag is a crew competing together.
  • Other traders walk the same map live.
Free forever. Trading just rewards you: your real Swamp Worth buffs your run, and launching a coin earns a legendary. You never have to trade to play.
9

Live Boss Raids

Open slimewire.org/raids. Every live launch is a boss.

  • Ape / Chart — buy or view any boss instantly.
  • Join Raid — posts a pre-filled shill on X and scores you on the raid leaderboard. Rally your crew.
  • Raid your own coin — paste any CA (you don't need to have launched it here) and it goes on the board with live data.
  • Top Raid Posts — X posts from the Telegram /raid command, ranked by likes + retweets.
10

All The Extra Pages

📡 Radar /radar

Fast scan of fresh launches in buckets (under 5k, volume waking, bonding fast). One-tap Ape / Chart / Raid.

🗓️ Events /events

Degen calendar — Raid Night (live countdown), Fresh Launch Hour, contests.

🪪 Profile /profile

Your swamp identity — catches, raids, survival, badges, crew. Shareable.

🪪 Swamp Card /receipts

One-tap shareable card of your run — download & post it.

👥 Crews /crews

TG/X groups compete by clan tag. Everyone's catches + raids stack up.

🎒 Locker /locker

Cosmetics you unlock by playing — titles, badges, skins.

🔭 Watchtower /watchtower

Most-raided coins, trending fresh, your watchlist.

🎬 Coin Story /replay

Paste a CA to replay a coin's journey, beat by beat.

11

Telegram Bot

DM the bot, or add it to your group and have an admin run /slimewire on for live alerts. Commands:

/start
Open the menu / link your account.
/look <CA>
SlimeShield read + chart + trade links. (In groups, just pasting a CA does it.)
/alpha
Current best picks / trending.
/ape
The freshest degen launches right now.
/raid <X link>
Put your raid post on the leaderboard (ranked by likes + RTs).
/proof
Public engine track record — wins AND losses.
/kols
KOL / whale activity.
/web
Jump to the web terminal.
12

Flex On X

SlimeWire turns your moves into shareable content — every share carries the site back to X:

  • Swamp Card — download your run card from /receipts and post it.
  • Shill / Flex buttons — one tap opens a pre-filled post with the CA + links.
  • Join Raid — posts your raid and gets you on the board.
  • Profile — share your /profile to show off your Dex + badges.
13

Tips & FAQ

Do I need a wallet to play?

No. The game, raids and all pages are free with no login. A wallet is only for buying, selling or launching.

What slippage should I use?

Start at 4%. Bump to 5–10% on brand-new/volatile coins if buys fail. Remember custom is in bps (500 = 5%).

How do I take profit automatically?

Set a Take Profit preset (e.g. +60% or custom 5x) and a Stop Loss (e.g. -10%) when you open the trade.

How do I get my group competing?

Pick a clan tag, have everyone set it in the game + on /raids, and climb the /crews board.

The full loop: scan /radar → ape or raid a coin → catch it in the /swamp → post your /receipts card → bring your crew on /crews. Repeat. 🐸🔥
🐸 SlimeWire · slimewire.org · The Degen Playbook · Play free, trade when you're ready. 🧌
